summary: This ERC extends [EIP-5792](./eip-5792.md) by defining capabilities that allow dApps to specify common token prerequisites for transactions, such as having certain [ERC-20](./eip-20.md), [ERC-721](./eip-721.md), or [ERC-1155](./eip-1155.md) tokens. Wallets can then help users meet these requirements before executing the transactions.
title: Wallet Call Token Capabilities
